cleavage agent: the proteins were digested using trypsin
fractionation method: fractionated by high pH reverse-phase HPLC using a Thermo Betasil C18 column
instrument: using Q Exactive™ Plus (Thermo) coupled online to the UPLC
ionization type: the peptides were subjected to a nanospray ionization source
labeling: were labelled using tandem mass tags (TMT)
